content: Facility cost: 13% p.a. fixed Murabaha Profit + 35% of SPV4 net profits, combined cap 18% p.a. of USD 15M
Parent Cash Balance covenant added as 7th covenant — manual input required, not trackable from tape data
BB Holiday Period: 5 months from 10 Feb 2026 (~Jul 2026) — borrowing base test suspended during this period
Qard Al Hassan: AED 8,263,125 (15% of commitments), interest-free, subordinated — provides credit enhancement
